sql_array: CREATE TABLE encryption_test (id UInt32, secret String, comment String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;

INSERT INTO encryption_test VALUES (1, encrypt('aes-256-cfb128', 'Hello World', '12345678910121314151617181920212'), 'Sample Comment 1'), (2, encrypt('aes-128-ecb', 'Test String 2', '1234567890123456'), 'Sample Comment 2');

SELECT comment, decrypt('aes-256-cfb128', secret, '12345678910121314151617181920212') as plaintext, (decrypt('aes-128-ecb', secret, '1234567890123456') ? 'Decrypted' : 'Failed') as decryption_status FROM encryption_test;
SELECT comment, (SELECT decrypt('aes-128-cbc', secret, '1234567890123456') ? true : false FROM encryption_test WHERE id = 1) as is_decrypted FROM encryption_test WHERE id = 2;

WITH (SELECT AVG(length) FROM (SELECT length(decrypt('aes-256-ofb', secret, '12345678910121314151617181920212')) AS length FROM encryption_test)) AS avg_length SELECT comment, decrypt('aes-256-ofb', secret, '12345678910121314151617181920212') as plaintext FROM encryption_test HAVING length(plaintext) > avg_length;

SELECT decrypt('aes-256-gcm', secret, '12345678910121314151617181920212', 'initialization_vector', 'authenticated_data') as decrypted_data, (decrypt('aes-128-gcm', secret, '1234567890123456', 'iv_data', 'aad_data') ? 'Valid' : 'Invalid') as validation_result FROM encryption_test;
CREATE TABLE temp_encryption (ciphertext String, key String, PRIMARY KEY (ciphertext)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY ciphertext;
SELECT decrypt('aes-128-ctr', ciphertext, key) as decrypted_text, (NULL ? 'Should not be null' : 'Is null') as null_check FROM temp_encryption;

SELECT decrypt('aes-192-ctr', secret, '1234567890123456789012345678901234', 'iv_example', 'ada_example') as decrypted, (decrypt('aes-128-ecb', secret, 'keyexample') ? 'Success' : 'Failure') as decryption_result FROM encryption_test WHERE comment LIKE '%Sample%';
